author: Allan Watkins
content: So it feels like GCP are now the guys who have opened up their own internal platform to see if anyone wants to use it and they are still trying to adapt to the fact that it’s a business for them now? That sounds a lot like my understanding of where AWS came from, except they are obviously further along the road – would you agree? Perhaps AWS’s myriad of services is a result of this as well i.e. they are now motivated to respond to customers asking for different things and their potential roadmaps exploded as they started trying to accommodate the needs of their customers, not just their own business…

author: Daniel Sepp
content: Good article. I’d be interested in seeing Azure added to this analysis.
